full_suite: go test ./... -race -count=1 (from engine/): PASS across engine, engine/btree, engine/catalog, engine/wal; no regressions
bug_found_and_fixed_during_implementatio: initial draft stored *fileState pointers into a slice while continuing to append to that same slice without pre-reserved capacity; a reallocating append silently invalidated earlier pointers, causing the first two files' recorded 'expected content' to go stale (missed their append). Fixed by pre-allocating files := make([]fileState, 0, len(prefixes)*filesPerPrefix) before taking any pointers into it.
